instruction: Create an SFTP-only user named charles with password Ex@mpleP@55w0rd!, home directory /home/test1, shell /usr/sbin/nologin, and primary group sftpusers. Set /home/test1 ownership to root:root with permission 755, then create /home/test1/upload owned by charles:sftpusers with permission 750. Also create /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/charles-sftp.conf so members of sftpusers are forced to use internal-sftp with ChrootDirectory /home/test1, AllowTcpForwarding no, and X11Forwarding no.
source: 外部参考来源：Ubuntu manpage - useradd(8) (https://manpages.ubuntu.com/manpages/jammy/en/man8/useradd.8.html)；Ubuntu manpage - usermod(8) (https://manpages.ubuntu.com/manpages/jammy/en/man8/usermod.8.html)；OpenSSH manual - sshd_config(5) (https://man7.org/linux/man-pages/man5/sshd_config.5.html)

parameters.command: echo {CLIENT_PASSWORD} | sudo -S bash -c 'userdel -r charles >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; groupdel sftpusers >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; rm -rf /home/test1; rm -f /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/charles-sftp.conf; mkdir -p /home/test1'

result.command: group_ok='false'; getent group sftpusers >/dev/null 2>&1 && group_ok='true'; user_ok='false'; getent passwd charles >/dev/null 2>&1 && user_ok='true'; home_ok='false'; [ "$(getent passwd charles 2>/dev/null | cut -d: -f6)" = '/home/test1' ] && home_ok='true'; shell_ok='false'; [ "$(getent passwd charles 2>/dev/null | cut -d: -f7)" = '/usr/sbin/nologin' ] && shell_ok='true'; primary_group_ok='false'; [ "$(id -gn charles 2>/dev/null)" = 'sftpusers' ] && primary_group_ok='true'; home_perm_ok='false'; [ "$(stat -c '%U:%G %a' /home/test1 2>/dev/null)" = 'root:root 755' ] && home_perm_ok='true'; upload_perm_ok='false'; [ "$(stat -c '%U:%G %a' /home/test1/upload 2>/dev/null)" = 'charles:sftpusers 750' ] && upload_perm_ok='true'; ssh_conf_ok='false'; conf=/etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/charles-sftp.conf; [ -f "$conf" ] && grep -Eq '^Match[[:space:]]+Group[[:space:]]+sftpusers$' "$conf" && grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]+ChrootDirectory[[:space:]]+/home/test1$' "$conf" && grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]+ForceCommand[[:space:]]+internal-sftp$' "$conf" && grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]+AllowTcpForwarding[[:space:]]+no$' "$conf" && grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]+X11Forwarding[[:space:]]+no$' "$conf" && ssh_conf_ok='true'; echo "group_ok=$group_ok"; echo "user_ok=$user_ok"; echo "home_ok=$home_ok"; echo "shell_ok=$shell_ok"; echo "primary_group_ok=$primary_group_ok"; echo "home_perm_ok=$home_perm_ok"; echo "upload_perm_ok=$upload_perm_ok"; echo "ssh_conf_ok=$ssh_conf_ok"
